project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 16 Next.js/React apps, 88 packages, 8 services (pnpm workspaces + turborepo)
build_system: pnpm 10.28 + turbo 2.9. turbo typecheck depends on ^build. All packages build with tsc, Next.js apps build with next build.
test_framework: vitest 2.x with per-package configs. React components use @testing-library/react + jsdom. 132 test tasks total.
build_command: pnpm typecheck (128 tasks) && pnpm test (132 tasks)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm typecheck - all tasks pass. 2. pnpm test - all tasks pass. 3. No new @ts-ignore or @ts-expect-error. 4. grep checks for removed patterns (localStorage token, hardcoded localhost in frontend fetches).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22 + pnpm available. No Docker daemon confirmed. No Xcode/Android Studio. No real databases (Postgres/Redis) - tests mock them.
contribution_requirements: One app per PR for frontend changes. Rebase on main before merge. Gates must be green (typecheck, test, build, lint). No fake components (return real JSX). Every screen needs skeleton/empty/error/success states. Brand tokens from @quant/brand. Motion uses framer-motion springs. Reduced-motion must be respected.
key_patterns: Apps use App Router (newer: quantai/quantchat/quantmail/quantcalendar/quantdocs/quantdrive/quantmeet) or Pages Router (older: quantsync/quantads/quantneon/quantube/quantmax/quantedits). Backend in each app's backend/ dir with Fastify. API routes proxy to backend. @quant/shared-ui has 98 tsx components. @quant/brand has color/motion/type tokens. api-client package has HttpClient + React Query hooks. Tests use vitest with vi.mock for external deps.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (16 Next.js apps), packages/ (88 shared libs), services/ (8 backend services), e2e/, scripts/, infra/, docs/. Each app has backend/ (Fastify) + src/ (Next.js pages/app). Key packages: shared-ui, brand, api-client, auth, ai, realtime, common, database.
